init_eqs_str: a['greencycle'] = 0; a['redcycle'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['q5'] = 0; a['randimgchng'] = 0; a['q4'] = 0; a['bluecycle'] = 0; a['brightsin'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['q3'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['wave_a']=0; a['zoom']=1; a['warp']=0; a['brightsin']=(0.45+div(Math.sin(a['time']),2)); a['q1']=a['brightsin']; a['q2']=a['randimgchng']; a['redcycle']=(0.65+Math.sin(div(a['time'],1.45))); a['q3']=a['redcycle']; a['greencycle']=(0.65+Math.sin(div(a['time'],1.85))); a['q4']=a['greencycle']; a['bluecycle']=(0.65+Math.sin(div(a['time'],2.25))); a['q5']=a['bluecycle'];
